calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Property Tax Refund Application
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Verleana Green, Esq., for Talia Moore, Personal Representative.
James Michel, Esq., for John Sykes, Creditor.

At the court's query, Mrs. Green confirms that the parent child exclusion has been filed with the City and County of San Francisco ("CCSF") and a reply is pending. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to take the subject matter off calendar pursuant to Ms. Green's report. No objection to the preceding is presented. Mr. Michel asks the court to have Ms. Green forward him any information regarding the pending matter involving the CCSF. Ms. Green agrees to do so. The court encourages the parties to meet and confer regarding the preceding.

The Status of the Property Tax Refund Application is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Estate of Alzina Marie Ray and
PTR-24-307159 The Marcus McClure 2024 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
James Michel appeared by zoom for John Sykes (creditor).

The court noted that Mrs. Green filed a notice document recently. Mr. Michel stated that he has an issue with respect to his client, that he understands that property taxes were paid, but he also understands that there is an application for a refund with respect to the parent child transfer exclusion and asked if the matter can remain under court supervision. Mrs. Green stated that the three-year time period to file for the parent child transfer exclusion has passed, that they are still working with the assessor's office to see if they will accept the application, that they paid $112,000.00 and that she does not know how long it will take. Status on filing of trustee's bond is off calendar. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission. Status of the property tax refund application is set for February 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Green is to file something two weeks prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Estate of Alzina Marie Ray and
PTR-24-307159 The Marcus McClure 2024 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
James Michel appeared by zoom for John Sykes (creditor).

Mrs. Green stated that she received additional information with respect to Mr. Ray's share, that a levy is being executed so that the funds that are going to Mr. Ray go back to the creditor with an exemption amount of $33,000.00, that a lien was executed on her client and that her client was served. Mrs. Green also stated that she has to amend the accounting petition, that supplemental taxes were levied and that the bond amount will need to be changed. Mr. Michel stated that the money has to go to the Contra Costa County Sheriff. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc., and status on filing of trustee's bond are continued to August 14, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belem. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
James Michel appeared by zoom for John Sykes (creditor).

Discussion was held regarding the issue of whether Mr. Michel lacks standing to request a continuance, whether a lien gives Mr. Michel's client standing, whether anything can be done until the bankruptcy discharge order comes in/whether this proceeding is stayed, whether the distribution to Larkin Derek Ray should be held, the issue of Mr. Sykes lacking standing because he is a creditor of one of the beneficiaries and not a creditor of the estate, the issue of whether it is appropriate for the money to go to the bankruptcy trustee, etc. The court stated that it does not understand the authority to pay Derik's distribution to the bankruptcy trustee and that it is reluctant to sign an order without having a better understanding of the implications of it. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to July 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mrs. Green believes it is appropriate to make distribution to the bankruptcy trustee, she is to file a memorandum of points and authorities in support of her position.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Jun-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Continued To Apr-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status On The Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Distribute Share Of Estate Of Heir Marcus Mcclure To Special Needs Trust For His Benefit
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Verleana Green appeared via zoom for Talia Moore (Petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding filing a new petition under a Probate Trust case. Petition to distribute share of estate of heir Marcus McClure etc., is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
